name: @aurora/backend
description: AURORA backend – secure Fastify API server

scripts.prestart: npm run build --workspace=@unifi/shared-core && npm run build --workspace=@unifi/governance-agent && npm run build --workspace=@unifi/knowledge-agent
scripts.pretest: npm run build --workspace=@unifi/shared-core && npm run build --workspace=@unifi/governance-agent && npm run build --workspace=@unifi/knowledge-agent
